soilPreparation.title: Dicas essenciais para preparar o solo
soilPreparation.excerpt: Aprenda segredos profissionais para preparar o solo antes da proxima safra e aumentar a produtividade...
soilPreparation.author: Admin
points: Dica: Choose the right tiller for your soil type.
Dica: Remove weeds and leftover crop residue before planting.
Dica: Maintain proper soil moisture before tilling.
Dica: Use cultivators for better aeration and root growth.
Dica: Break large soil clods before seed placement.
Dica: Level the field to avoid waterlogging in low spots.
Dica: Add compost or organic manure before final cultivation.
Dica: Avoid working soil when it is too wet or sticky.
Dica: Check soil pH and correct nutrient imbalance early.
Dica: Prepare raised beds for vegetables and delicate crops.
Dica: Keep tiller blades clean and sharp for uniform soil mixing.
Dica: Use shallow cultivation around existing roots.
Dica: Plan drainage channels before the rainy season.
Dica: Rotate crops to maintain soil health.
Dica: Do a final light pass before sowing for smooth seed beds.

powerTools.title: Manutencao das suas ferramentas eletricas
powerTools.excerpt: Um guia completo para limpar e manter ferramentas industriais com mais durabilidade e seguranca...
powerTools.author: Especialista agricola
points: Dica: Clean tools after every use.
Dica: Remove soil, dust, and crop residue from blades.
Dica: Check engine oil before starting.
Dica: Clean or replace air filters regularly.
Dica: Tighten loose nuts, bolts, and screws.
Dica: Sharpen blades when cutting performance decreases.
Dica: Check fuel lines for leakage.
Dica: Store tools in a dry and shaded place.
Dica: Inspect power cables and switches.
Dica: Use only recommended fuel or power source.
Dica: Service the tool at regular intervals.

irrigation.title: Tecnicas modernas de irrigacao
irrigation.excerpt: Conheca sistemas modernos de irrigacao que economizam agua e transformam a agricultura na India...
irrigation.author: Editor
points: Dica: Use drip irrigation to save water in row crops.
Dica: Maintain pumps and filters regularly.
Dica: Choose quality hoses, pipes, and connectors.
Dica: Monitor water pressure during irrigation.
Dica: Install filters before drip lines to reduce clogging.
Dica: Flush drip pipes at regular intervals.
Dica: Use sprinklers for even coverage in open fields.
Dica: Select pump capacity based on field size and head height.
Dica: Repair leaks quickly to prevent water loss.
Dica: Schedule irrigation early morning or evening.
Dica: Group crops with similar water needs together.
Dica: Use rain guns for larger field coverage.
Dica: Check nozzles for blockage before every cycle.
Dica: Protect pipes from direct damage during field operations.
Dica: Track soil moisture before increasing watering time.
